captions:
We’re turning 12 tomorrow, so we had to take a trip down memory lane🎂
Thank you for supporting a homegrown brand, the journey has been unforgettable all because you!

[ the souled store, celebration, 12th anniversary, pop culture, fandom, birthday, homegrown, limited edition, gratitude, celebration, fyp, made in india ]

Finally checked this off our bucket list!

Thanks to your support for The Souled Store over the years, we’ve been able to adopt 2 animal facilities run by @worldforallanimaladoptions.

Watch this space for foster alerts, adoption updates, and the fun happenings behind the scenes of an animal shelter.

#thesouledstore #worldforall #animalshelter #dogshelter #catshelter #adoption #adoptionalert #dogsofinstagram #catsofinstagram #explore

Which city should we come to next?👀
WAIT TILL THE END FOR THE GRAND REVEAL!

At The Souled Store, art and pop culture aren’t just something for our product designs—they’re what we live and breathe- and that’s exactly what inspired us for our NEWEST STORE IN JODHPUR!
A tribute to our favourite worlds, stories, and icons designed in the traditional Rajasthani art style.

📍Plot No. 383, 3rd C-Road, Sardarpura, Jodhpur, Rajasthan - 342206

[ the souled store, rajasthan, jodhpur, india, store launch,

Fits of the season 😮‍💨

Website/App Search📱
Batman: Vengeance
The Godfather: Don’s Decree
How To Train Your Dragon: Night Fury
Barca: Legacy Jacket
Oversized Hoodie: Checkmate
Polar Fleece Jacket: Peanuts Happy Day
Wolverine: Weapon X

[ the souled store, menswear, fit, winterwear, the godfather, batman, wolverine, fc barcelona, dc, marvel, pop culture, fandom, fyp ]

Which 2025 release was your favourite? 🎬

[ the souled store, movies, mickey 17, pluribus, all her fault, sci-fi, tv shows, thriller, fyp, fandom, pop culture ]

The Soup Kitchen - A place where homeless souls found comfort and home, with my famjam @thesouledstore 

We decided to celebrate Christmas by making tonnes of soup for the ones who were struggling with cold and hunger.

What started as a soup kitchen became a place of hope, relief and love.

Merry Christmas from TSS and me to you and your loved ones :)))

Stranger things hits different when you know these facts 💯

[ the souled store, stranger things, trivia, tv show, fandom, pop culture, fyp ]

Which team should we cover next? 🎥

trendy_captions:
We’re turning 12 tomorrow, so we had to take a trip down memory lane🎂
Thank you for supporting a homegrown brand, the journey has been unforgettable all because you!

Which city should we come to next?👀
WAIT TILL THE END FOR THE GRAND REVEAL!
analysis.growth_strategy: The Souled Store leverages pop culture and fandoms to create relatable content and products, driving engagement through trivia, questions, and behind-the-scenes glimpses. They also focus on community building by highlighting social initiatives and asking for audience input on future content and store locations, fostering a loyal customer base.
analysis.opportunity_gap: The brand could explore more user-generated content (UGC) to build trust and authenticity. Collaborating with relevant influencers or other brands could also expand their reach and introduce them to new audiences. Focusing on running contests or giveaways could also help boost engagement.
